mapper.sql: select p.*, ifnull(s.sku_count, 0) as sku_count, s.supply_price_min, s.supply_price_max, s.sale_price_min, s.sale_price_max, s.currency_summary, null as available_stock, null as warehouse_count, null as inventory_status, null as stock_update_time from product_spu p left join ( select spu_id, count(1) as sku_count, min(supply_price) as supply_price_min, max(supply_price) as supply_price_max, min(sale_price) as sale_price_min, max(sale_price) as sale_price_max, case when count(distinct currency_code) = 1 then min(currency_code) else 'MULTI' end as currency_summary from product_sku where del_flag = '0' and control_status = 'NORMAL' group by spu_id ) s on s.spu_id = p.spu_id

select p.*, s.sku_count, null as supply_price_min, null as supply_price_max, s.sale_price_min, s.sale_price_max, s.currency_summary, null as available_stock, null as warehouse_count, null as inventory_status, null as stock_update_time from product_spu p inner join ( select spu_id, count(1) as sku_count, min(sale_price) as sale_price_min, max(sale_price) as sale_price_max, case when count(distinct currency_code) = 1 then min(currency_code) else 'MULTI' end as currency_summary from product_sku where del_flag = '0' and sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and control_status = 'NORMAL' group by spu_id ) s on s.spu_id = p.spu_id
mapper.select:
where p.del_flag = '0' and p.spu_status = 'ON_SALE' and p.control_status = 'NORMAL'
and ( p.product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.product_name_en like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.selling_point like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and p.product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
and p.product_name_en like concat('%', #{productNameEn}, '%')
and p.category_id = #{categoryId}
order by p.update_time desc, p.spu_id desc
where p.spu_id = #{spuId} and p.del_flag = '0' and p.spu_status = 'ON_SALE' and p.control_status = 'NORMAL' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into product_spu( system_spu_code, seller_spu_code, seller_id, seller_no, seller_name, category_id, category_code, category_name, product_name, product_name_en, selling_point, main_image_url, detail_content, spu_status, control_status, control_reason, source_type, source_ref_type, source_ref_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{systemSpuCode}, #{sellerSpuCode}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerNo}, #{sellerName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{productName}, #{productNameEn}, #{sellingPoint}, #{mainImageUrl}, #{detailContent}, #{spuStatus}, #{controlStatus}, #{controlReason}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefType}, #{sourceRefId}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update product_spu set seller_spu_code = #{sellerSpuCode}, seller_id = #{sellerId}, seller_no = #{sellerNo}, seller_name = #{sellerName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, category_name = #{categoryName}, product_name = #{productName}, product_name_en = #{productNameEn}, selling_point = #{sellingPoint}, main_image_url = #{mainImageUrl}, detail_content = #{detailContent}, spu_status = #{spuStatus}, control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{controlReason}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_spu set spu_status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'

update product_spu set control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{reason},
control_by = #{updateBy}, control_time = sysdate(),
recover_by = #{updateBy}, recover_time = sysdate(),
update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select sk.*, null as system_spu_code, null as seller_spu_code, null as seller_name, null as category_id, null as category_name, null as product_name, null as product_name_en, null as spu_status, null as spu_control_status, null as available_stock, null as warehouse_count, null as inventory_status, null as stock_update_time from product_sku sk where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, sku_id asc

select sk.*, null as system_spu_code, null as seller_spu_code, null as seller_name, null as category_id, null as category_name, null as product_name, null as product_name_en, null as spu_status, null as spu_control_status, null as available_stock, null as warehouse_count, null as inventory_status, null as stock_update_time from product_sku sk where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} and sk.sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and sk.control_status = 'NORMAL' and sk.del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, sku_id asc

select sk.*, null as system_spu_code, null as seller_spu_code, null as seller_name, null as category_id, null as category_name, null as product_name, null as product_name_en, null as spu_status, null as spu_control_status, null as available_stock, null as warehouse_count, null as inventory_status, null as stock_update_time from product_sku sk where sk.sku_id = #{skuId} and sk.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into product_sku( spu_id, seller_id, system_sku_code, seller_sku_code, color, size, length_value, width_value, height_value, weight, material, style, model, package_quantity, capacity, sku_image_url, supply_price, sale_price, currency_code, sku_status, control_status, control_reason, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{spuId}, #{sellerId}, #{systemSkuCode}, #{sellerSkuCode}, #{color}, #{size}, #{lengthValue}, #{widthValue}, #{heightValue}, #{weight}, #{material}, #{style}, #{model}, #{packageQuantity}, #{capacity}, #{skuImageUrl}, #{supplyPrice}, #{salePrice}, #{currencyCode}, #{skuStatus}, #{controlStatus}, #{controlReason}, #{sortOrder}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update product_sku set seller_id = #{sellerId}, seller_sku_code = #{sellerSkuCode}, color = #{color}, size = #{size}, length_value = #{lengthValue}, width_value = #{widthValue}, height_value = #{heightValue}, weight = #{weight}, material = #{material}, style = #{style}, model = #{model}, package_quantity = #{packageQuantity}, capacity = #{capacity}, sku_image_url = #{skuImageUrl}, supply_price = #{supplyPrice}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, currency_code = #{currencyCode}, sku_status = #{skuStatus}, control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{controlReason}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where sku_id = #{skuId} and spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set sku_status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and del_flag = '0'

update product_sku set control_status = #{controlStatus}, control_reason = #{reason},
control_by = #{updateBy}, control_time = sysdate(),
recover_by = #{updateBy}, recover_time = sysdate(),
update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set sale_price = #{salePrice}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sku_id = #{skuId} and del_flag = '0'
update product_sku set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where spu_id = #{spuId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select count(1) from product_sku where spu_id = #{spuId} and sku_status = 'ON_SALE' and control_status = 'NORMAL' and del_flag = '0'
select * from product_attribute_value where spu_id = #{spuId} order by value_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into product_attribute_value( owner_type, owner_id, spu_id, category_id, category_schema_version, attribute_id, attribute_code, attribute_name, attribute_type, value_code, value_text, value_number, value_date, value_json, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{spuId}, #{categoryId}, #{categorySchemaVersion}, #{attributeId}, #{attributeCode}, #{attributeName}, #{attributeType}, #{valueCode}, #{valueText}, #{valueNumber}, #{valueDate}, #{valueJson}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.select: select * from product_image where spu_id = #{spuId} order by sort_order asc, image_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into product_image( owner_type, owner_id, spu_id, sku_id, image_url, image_role, sort_order, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageRole}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
